en: So I exhort the elders among you, as a fellow elder and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, as well as a partaker in the glory that is going to be revealed:
zh: 我這同作長老，也是為基督受苦作見證，又是同享將來所要顯現的榮耀的，勸你們當中作長老的：

en: shepherd the flock of God that is among you, exercising oversight, not under compulsion, but willingly, as God would have you; not for shameful gain, but eagerly;
zh: 務要牧養在你們中間的 神的羊群，按著 神的旨意看顧他們。不是出於勉強，而是出於甘心；不是因為貪財，而是出於熱誠；

en: not domineering over those in your charge, but being examples to the flock.
zh: 也不是要轄制託付你們的羊群，而是作他們的榜樣。

en: And when the chief Shepherd appears, you will receive the unfading crown of glory.
zh: 到了牧長顯現的時候，你們必定得著那永不衰殘的榮耀冠冕。

en: Likewise, you who are younger, be subject to the elders. Clothe yourselves, all of you, with humility toward one another, for "God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble."
zh: 照樣，你們青年人要順服年長的。就是你們各人也要彼此以謙卑為裝束，因為 “ 神敵擋驕傲的人， 賜恩給謙卑的人。”

en: Humble yourselves, therefore, under the mighty hand of God so that at the proper time he may exalt you,
zh: 所以你們要謙卑，服在 神大能的手下，到了時候，他必叫你們升高。

en: casting all your anxieties on him, because he cares for you.
zh: 你們要把一切憂慮卸給 神，因為他顧念你們。

en: Be sober-minded; be watchful. Your adversary the devil prowls around like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
zh: 你們要謹守、警醒。你們的仇敵魔鬼，好像吼叫的獅子走來走去，尋找可以吞吃的人；

en: Resist him, firm in your faith, knowing that the same kinds of suffering are being experienced by your brotherhood throughout the world.
zh: 你們要用堅強的信心抵擋他，因為知道你們在世上的弟兄，也經歷過同樣的苦難。

en: And after you have suffered a little while, the God of all grace, who has called you to his eternal glory in Christ, will himself restore, confirm, strengthen, and establish you.
zh: 但滿有恩典的 神，就是在基督裡召你們進入他永遠榮耀的那一位，在你們受了短暫的苦難之後，必定親自成全你們，堅固你們，賜力量給你們，建立你們。

en: To him be the dominion forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 願權能歸給他，直到永遠。阿們。

en: By Silvanus, a faithful brother as I regard him, I have written briefly to you, exhorting and declaring that this is the true grace of God. Stand firm in it.
zh: 我藉著我認為忠心的弟兄西拉，簡略地寫了這封信勸勉你們，又向你們證實這是 神真正的恩典；你們要在這恩典上站立得住。

en: She who is at Babylon, who is likewise chosen, sends you greetings, and so does Mark, my son.
zh: 在巴比倫與你們同蒙揀選的，和我兒子馬可都問候你們。

en: Greet one another with the kiss of love. Peace to all of you who are in Christ.
zh: 你們要用愛心彼此親吻問安。願平安歸與你們所有在基督裡的人。
